metadata.description: Train with the right coach. Routines, tracking, and real results.

metadata.title: Forzza — Coaching that actually works
metadata.description: We connect students with certified coaches. Personalized routines, check-ins, progress, and payments in one place.

hero.headline: FORZZA
hero.body: We connect students with certified coaches. Routines, check-ins, progress, and payments in one place.
hero.disclaimer: No credit card · Free plan forever

features.headline: Everything you need to train better
features.subheadline: One platform. Students, coaches, and owners.

routines.title: Personalized routines
routines.desc: Your coach builds your plan around your goals and level. Follow it step by step with guidance.

progress.title: Measurable progress
progress.desc: Log sessions, weight, and photos. See real improvement week by week.

chat.title: Direct chat
chat.desc: Real-time feedback from your coach. Fix technique, adjust the plan.

payments.title: Secure payments
payments.desc: Mercado Pago with a 72-hour guarantee. Coaches get paid when they deliver.

offline.title: Offline-first
offline.desc: Train without a connection. Auto-sync when you're back online.

trust.title: Verified coaches
trust.desc: Real validation process. Professional credentials included.

step1.title: Pick your coach
step1.desc: Browse the marketplace, check profiles, prices, and specialties.

step2.title: Start training
step2.desc: Your coach builds your routine and gives you personalized follow-up.

step3.title: Track your progress
step3.desc: Weekly check-ins, body photos, and metrics. No excuses.

pricing.headline: Plans for students
pricing.subheadline: Start free. Upgrade whenever you want more.

coachCta.headline: Are you a coach?
coachCta.body:
Create your profile, publish your packages, and manage your students from one place.
No fixed subscription. Commission only when you sell.

login.title: Sign in to your account

login.devBannerBody: Any email/password works. Use "admin@test.com" for admin or "coach@test.com" for coach.

forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Could not send the email. Please try again.
forgotPassword.successDescription: Check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.

resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Could not update the password. Reopen the link from the email and try again.
resetPassword.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.

offline.title: No connection
offline.description: Check your internet connection and try again.

pendiente.heading: Application submitted
pendiente.body1Start: We received your application. Our team will review it within the next
pendiente.body2: We'll notify you by email when it's approved and you can start publishing your packages.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Forzza collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.section1Body: We collect information you provide when signing up (name, email, country), usage data (workouts, sets, weights), and payment data processed by Mercado Pago (we do not store card details).
privacy.section2Body: Progress photos are stored on private servers, accessible only to you and your contracted coach. They are never shared with third parties or used to train AI models.
privacy.section3Body: You can request deletion of your account and all data at any time from the profile section, or by writing to privacidad@forzza.app. We respond within 30 business days.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.intro: By using Forzza you accept these terms. If you disagree, do not use the service.
terms.section1Body: By registering or using the Forzza platform (mobile app, website, and backoffice) you accept these terms as currently in force. Forzza may update them with 30 days' notice.
terms.section2Body: Forzza is a platform connecting students and fitness coaches. We are not employers of the coaches and do not guarantee athletic results. Each coach is an independent professional.
terms.section3Body: Payments are processed through Mercado Pago. Forzza retains a 20% commission on each payment to the coach. Prices are expressed in the local currency of the coach's country.
